title: shopping trolley
description: Screw pigs. What people really want is shopping trolleys - lots and lots and lots of shopping trolleys.
body:
pigs become shopping trolleys.
they can be red, green, blue, yellow, orange, pink, silver or black (zombro only).
sometimes people will be pushing the trolleys in fluro vests like at the shops.
the baby pigs have little flags.
saddle them for a box or crate of fruit to ride.
use a box on a stick to steer.
kill them to get edible trolley wheels.
carrot on a stick ---> cardboard box on a stick.
pig ---> shopping trolley.
rename trolleys to "**jackass**" for a giant trolley with Wee Man riding it (when saddled).
or rename them to "**zombro**" for a trolley pusher wearing black with a zombie mask and a black trolley.
zombie's eyes glow with shaders enabled.
raw porkchop --> raw trolley wheel.
cooked porkchop --> cooked trolley wheel.
btw the wheels spin and the flag moves around.
ok that's all I have to say about that. 

**_to suggest new features click [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/forums/communities/modeling/give-me-suggestions-for-my-shopping-trolley-resource-pack-690174/) <---_**
### **REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR EMF/ETF TO WORK!**


### --> [**Planet Minecraft Page**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/shopping-trolley-optifine/) <--
